debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
g : V → U
h : g ∘ f = id
⊢ image g ∘ image f = id

failed_attempts:
by
  funext A
  apply ext
  intro u
  constructor
  · intro hu
    rcases hu with ⟨v, hv, hgv⟩
    rcases hv with ⟨u', hu', hfu'⟩
    subst hfu'
    subst hu'
    simpa [image, Function.comp, h] using hgv
  · intro hu
    refine ⟨f u, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩
    · simpa [image, Function.comp, h]

by
  funext S
  ext v
  constructor
  · intro hv
    rcases hv with ⟨u, hu, hv⟩
    rcases hu with ⟨v', hv', hu⟩
    subst hu
    subst hv
    simpa [Function.comp, image, id] using congrArg (fun t => v ∈ t) (congrArg (fun k => k v') h)
  · intro hv
    refine ⟨f v, ?_, by simp [image, Function.comp]⟩
    refine ⟨v, hv, by simp [image, Function.comp]⟩

by
  funext s
  ext x

    simpa [Function.comp, h] using hu
  · intro hx
    refine ⟨f x, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    · simpa [Function.comp, h]

by
  funext S
  ext u
  constructor
  · intro hu
    rcases hu with ⟨v, hv, hgv⟩
    rcases hv with ⟨u', hu', hfu'⟩
    have : u' = u := by
      have := congrArg (fun t => g t u) hfu'
      simpa [Function.comp] using this
    subst this
    have : g (f u) = u := by
      have := congrArg (fun t => t u) h
      simpa [Function.comp, id] using this
    have : v = u := by
      have := congrArg (fun t => t u) hgv
      simpa [this] using this
    subst this
    exact hu'
  · intro hu
    refine ⟨f u, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩
    · have : g (f u) = u := by
        have := congrArg (fun t => t u) h
        simpa [Function.comp, id] using this
      ext u'
      by_cases h' : u = u'
      · subst h'
        simpa [this]
      · simp [h', this]
